data.metadata:
{"description":"Lola is a top Abstract streamer and an amazing artist. She always brings great vibes, and her smile is contagious. Always kind and positive, she also introduces her community to Web3 and Abstract through games, dApps, and her streams.

Recently reaching giga status, she has become one of the faces of the chain over the past few months. Consistent and reliable, she is fully committed and truly reflects the values of the chain.

If you’re not following her yet… there’s still time 
Sigan a mi parcerita, es una chimba 🔥"}

translation.translatedDescription:
Lola is a top Abstract streamer and an amazing artist. She always brings great vibes, and her smile is contagious. Always kind and positive, she also introduces her community to Web3 and Abstract through games, dApps, and her streams.

Recently reaching giga status, she has become one of the faces of the chain over the past few months. Consistent and reliable, she is fully committed and truly reflects the values of the chain.

If you’re not following her yet… there’s still time 
Follow my friend, she's awesome 🔥

data.metadata: {"description":"For me, he is the grain of sand that set the entire abstract hourglass in motion on Ethos. At the origin of the Giga wave, he played a key role in the massive arrival of hundreds and by extension thousands of users on Ethos. He also educated all of us tremendously at this level. Guezito is the kind of person who doesn’t make much noise but never stops working. A true example."}

translation.translatedDescription: For me, he is the grain of sand that set the entire abstract hourglass in motion on Ethos. At the origin of the Giga wave, he played a key role in the massive arrival of hundreds and by extension thousands of users on Ethos. He also educated all of us tremendously at this level. Guezito is the kind of person who doesn’t make much noise but never stops working. A true example.

Pavil is a fellow Giga Chad on Abstract ecosystem whose art is what caught everyone's eye. 

He creates the most epic street art with web3 culture embedded in them. 

Seems like a good and helpful person in general as well. Top giga chad material for sure.

data.comment: Real Giga Chad and community builder on Abstract
data.metadata: {"description":"I met Guezit0 in Abstract community. He is very active interms of ecosystem engagement and content creation. His value is above and beyond. His inclusion in the community creates great postive impact to the Abstract as a whole. I believe that he can move up to another level with this great pace !"}

translation.translatedContent: Real Giga Chad and community builder on Abstract
translation.translatedDescription: I met Guezit0 in Abstract community. He is very active interms of ecosystem engagement and content creation. His value is above and beyond. His inclusion in the community creates great postive impact to the Abstract as a whole. I believe that he can move up to another level with this great pace !

data.metadata: {"description":"Met guezito for the first time in the Abstract Discord. Super active member, he guides Gigachads into the Ethos and helps everywhere he can. His Twitter has an unfairly low follower count right now and it’s very likely this number will 10x within the next year."}

translation.translatedDescription: Met guezito for the first time in the Abstract Discord. Super active member, he guides Gigachads into the Ethos and helps everywhere he can. His Twitter has an unfairly low follower count right now and it’s very likely this number will 10x within the next year.

data.metadata: {"description":"L0K0 is a real OG on Abstract, he launched the first NFT collection on Abstract, during the Testnet, the collection was innovative with a new IP, is also difficult to deploy especially when you are the first to launch.\nHumanly he is a serious and professional person."}

{"description":"Gigachad très implanté au sein de l'ecosystem Abstract, en effet dans un premier temps il est gigachad ce qui déjà indique qu'il a été reconnu pour son implication sur Abstract, mais il est également très engagé au sein de la communauté Ruyui qui est un projet sur Abstract ayant rencontré un grand succés. \n\nIl partage du contenu intéressant au sujet d'Abstract / RUYUI de manière journalière sur X."}

translation.translatedDescription:
A Gigachad deeply embedded within the Abstract ecosystem. Firstly, he is a Gigachad, which already indicates that he has been recognized for his involvement with Abstract. Furthermore, he is also very engaged within the Ruyui community, which is a highly successful project on Abstract.

He shares interesting content about Abstract / RUYUI on a daily basis on X.

data.metadata: {"description":"Un merveilleux gigachad qui a tout compris à la vie. Bitcoin + Abstract Maxi quel combo incroyable. étant moi même un grand fan de Bitcoin Wizards je ne peux que être ami avec ce mec. \n\nIl est un Gigachad au sein de l'ecosystème Abstract, il est présent sur les réseaux, intervient de manière pertinente et amicale, aide quand il peut. C'est vraiment une personne respectable."}

translation.translatedDescription:
A wonderful gigachad who has figured out life. Bitcoin + Abstract Maxi, what an incredible combination. Being a big fan of Bitcoin Wizards myself, I can only be friends with this guy. 

He is a Gigachad within the Abstract ecosystem, he is present on social media, intervenes in a relevant and friendly manner, and helps when he can. He is truly a respectable person.

data.metadata: {"description":"Time to vouch for Rad! Always involve into Pudgy Ecosystem , trying to grow up local community in Thailand. Keep building!"}

translation.translatedDescription: Time to vouch for Rad! Always involve into Pudgy Ecosystem , trying to grow up local community in Thailand. Keep building!

data.metadata: {"description":"Pavil has proven himself that he is a great artist in the Pudgy community through consistent dedication and quality contribution. He is also an OG member and always support community through his high quality street art contribution. I can feel his great passion and dedication on that. Moe than that, he is also Giga chad member for Abstract community which is hard earned role, only genuine member can get it!"}

translation.translatedDescription: Pavil has proven himself that he is a great artist in the Pudgy community through consistent dedication and quality contribution. He is also an OG member and always support community through his high quality street art contribution. I can feel his great passion and dedication on that. Moe than that, he is also Giga chad member for Abstract community which is hard earned role, only genuine member can get it!

data.metadata: {"description":"Vouch to Abstract OG Gigachad. Well-known and trusted builder. His infographics on next level. His contribution in green chain are huge and especially to Gigaverse. No matter what's happen on market he is building."}

translation.translatedDescription: Vouch to Abstract OG Gigachad. Well-known and trusted builder. His infographics on next level. His contribution in green chain are huge and especially to Gigaverse. No matter what's happen on market he is building.

data.metadata: {"description":"Every time I see new work from Pavil, it feels like a reminder of why I love this space. Creative, recognizable, and always pushing boundaries. \n\nHe's been rocking with Pudgy Penguins, creates dope street art for projects in the Abstract ecosystem and he does it all without losing his unique style. That mix of creativity + community is rare. Definitely one of the names to watch long term."}

translation.translatedDescription:
Every time I see new work from Pavil, it feels like a reminder of why I love this space. Creative, recognizable, and always pushing boundaries. 

He's been rocking with Pudgy Penguins, creates dope street art for projects in the Abstract ecosystem and he does it all without losing his unique style. That mix of creativity + community is rare. Definitely one of the names to watch long term.

data.metadata: {"description":"Abstract community full of supportive people. Ruyui Guardian, Lil Pudgy Holder,  Gigachad, and absolutely Duper superhero! He is focusing on gaming dapps!"}

translation.translatedDescription: Abstract community full of supportive people. Ruyui Guardian, Lil Pudgy Holder,  Gigachad, and absolutely Duper superhero! He is focusing on gaming dapps!

data.metadata: {"description":"Saw Billy for the first time on Abstract's discord and I've seen him every day since. He helps every new user who runs into problems on our chain. Honored Gigachad since he is literally online 24/7 and helps everyone."}

translation.translatedDescription: Saw Billy for the first time on Abstract's discord and I've seen him every day since. He helps every new user who runs into problems on our chain. Honored Gigachad since he is literally online 24/7 and helps everyone.

data.metadata: {"description":"I met Sinet while playing a match of PromotionRoyale, and we instantly hit it off. He’s a top player in abstract games, very patient on OnchainHero, and managed to level up all his heroes past level 30 using regular training, never giving in to hype or risk. I’d describe him as a patient predator. I’m sure he’ll also become one of the top players in Monsterfun."}

translation.translatedDescription: I met Sinet while playing a match of PromotionRoyale, and we instantly hit it off. He’s a top player in abstract games, very patient on OnchainHero, and managed to level up all his heroes past level 30 using regular training, never giving in to hype or risk. I’d describe him as a patient predator. I’m sure he’ll also become one of the top players in Monsterfun.

data.metadata: {"description":"Met him on Abstract in Promotion Royale game and he's a really kind guy and really hard working. If you go into the leadboard of any dApp - you will see Gucci there. Future Abstract Gigachad, of that I have no doubt. Also he streams and it's real top content, not to mention the alpha he shares on X."}

translation.translatedDescription: Met him on Abstract in Promotion Royale game and he's a really kind guy and really hard working. If you go into the leadboard of any dApp - you will see Gucci there. Future Abstract Gigachad, of that I have no doubt. Also he streams and it's real top content, not to mention the alpha he shares on X.

data.author: 0x6500555EEAAA4A0f040c558Ec0282c342daa5259
data.subject: 0x0000000000000000000000000000000000000000
data.metadata:
{
  "description": "어젯밤 정말 너무 고마운 일이 있었어요! 제가 Abstract의 수집 플랫폼 DYLI에서 너무 마음에 드는 'Fugz First Edition Hoodie'를 오퍼 가격에 걸어두고 있었어요. 그리고 까먹었죠 ㅋㅋㅋ

그런데 어제 제가 Fugz NFT를 구매한 걸 보고, AL님이 "오, 너가 Fugz 산 거 봤고 후드티 가지고 싶어 하는 것도 봤어! 그러니까 선물해 줄게!"라고 말한 뒤 정말 쿨하게 후드티 NFT를 저에게 전송해 줬어요! 저는 즉시 저의 집으로 배송을 시켰습니다. 정말 감동받았어요.

Pudgy 커뮤니티가 이렇게 따뜻합니다. 무엇 하나 바라는 것 없이 헌신하며 선뜻 선행을 베푸는 Web 3.0 커뮤니티를 보신 적이 있나요? AL님의 선행은 여기서 멈추지 않습니다. 한국에서 저와 약간의 친분이 있는 Sook이라는 여성 Pudgy 가족이 있어요. 이분은 Pudgy Korea를 맡아서 한국에서 활동하는 분입니다. 저도 작년에 Sook이 운영하는 Pudgy 자선 행사에 가서 기부에 동참한 적이 있는데... 이때 AL은 Pudgy Korea와 Sook이 주최하는 자선 행사에 기부하기도 했어요. 이런 선행은 널리 알려져야 한다고 생각합니다!

너무 칭찬만 했나요? AL은 제가 아는 것보다 훨씬 예전부터 Pudgy 커뮤니티를 지킨 OG 유저이기도 합니다. 1000일 넘게 NFT를 가지고 있어야 할 SBT를 가지고 있기 때문에 제가 잘 알아요. 지금은 저와 함께 Abstract를 든든하게 지탱하는 Giga Chad이기도 하답니다?

실제로 X 피드에 가서 보면 앱스트랙트 생태계에서 어떤 일이 벌어지고 있는지 구체적으로 알 수 있어요. 저는 좀 제가 하고 싶은 것만 하는 스타일이라면, AL은 사람들과 잘 어울려서 문화를 적극적으로 주도한달까요?

그와 함께 Abstract, 그리고 Pudgy의 일원이라는 사실이 참 기뻐요!"
}

translation.translatedDescription:
Something incredibly grateful happened last night! I had put in an offer on a 'Fugz First Edition Hoodie' on Abstract's collection platform, DYLI, and then forgot about it lol.

But yesterday, after seeing I had purchased a Fugz NFT, AL said, "Oh, I saw you bought Fugz and that you wanted the hoodie! So I'll gift it to you!" and then, very coolly, transferred the hoodie NFT to me! I immediately had it shipped to my home. I was truly touched.

This is how warm the Pudgy community is. Have you ever seen a Web 3.0 community that dedicates itself and performs good deeds selflessly? AL's good deeds don't stop here. There's a fellow Pudgy family member named Sook, a woman I have a slight acquaintance with in Korea. She manages Pudgy Korea and is active in Korea. Last year, I also participated in a Pudgy charity event run by Sook and made a donation... At that time, AL also donated to the charity event hosted by Pudgy Korea and Sook. I believe such good deeds should be widely known!

Have I praised them too much? AL is also an OG user who has protected the Pudgy community long before I knew them. I know this well because they hold an SBT that requires holding an NFT for over 1000 days. And now, they are a Giga Chad who strongly supports Abstract alongside me?

If you actually go to their X feed, you can specifically see what's happening in the Abstract ecosystem. While I tend to do what I want, AL is good at interacting with people and actively leads the culture.

I am truly happy to be a part of Abstract and Pudgy alongside them!

data.author: 0xFaDd3C023e295FDBA31fc2b57770029318960beD
data.subject: 0x0000000000000000000000000000000000000000
data.metadata: {"description":"그는 놀라운 활동량과 정보력으로 한국 앱스트랙트에서 대체 불가한 존재로 자리잡았습니다.\n\n그가 한국 앱스트랙트에서 가지는 영향력은 누구나 인정할겁니다. 항상 좋은 정보들을 빠르게 커뮤니티에 전파시키는 한편, 다른 다양한 커뮤니티와도 끊임없이 교류합니다. KBW에서 실제로 그를 보았고, 그는 현실에서도 너무 훌륭하고 좋은 사람이었습니다. 그가 있어서 행복하고 앞으로도 계속 그가 한국 커뮤니티들을 이끌어 주길 바랍니다. 항상 도움받고있습니다."}

translation.translatedDescription:
With his incredible activity and information, he has established himself as an irreplaceable figure in the Korean Abstract community.

Everyone will acknowledge the influence he holds within the Korean Abstract community. He consistently disseminates valuable information quickly to the community while also constantly interacting with various other communities. I actually saw him at KBW, and he was a truly wonderful and kind person in person. I am happy to have him, and I hope he continues to lead the Korean communities. I am always receiving help from him.

data.author: 0x6500555EEAAA4A0f040c558Ec0282c342daa5259
data.subject: 0x0000000000000000000000000000000000000000
data.metadata:
{
  "description": "Pavil 씨가 Pudgy 커뮤니티에서 MVP인 걸 아시나요? 매주 커뮤니티에서 회원들의 눈에 띄는 펭귄들이 추천받는 명예의 전당이 있는데, 거기에 본인의 Pudgy NFT를 올린 친구예요. 그만큼 커뮤니티에 진심이라는 소리입니다.

이 친구는 스트릿 아티스트인데 마음이 참 따뜻해요. 펏지 커뮤니티의 일원에게 어떤 일이 생기면 그날을 기억한 후, 특별한 이벤트가 있는 사람의 펏지 NFT로 거리에 그림을 그리고 커뮤니티에 자랑합니다. 사람들이 다들 좋아해요.

그림 그리는 게 난이도가 높고 힘든 과정인데, 꾸준히 지금까지 예술을 하는 게 멋있어요. 언젠가는 저의 펏지 펭귄 그림도 그려주면 정말 좋을 것 같아요.

Abstract에서 방송하면서 그림 그리는 걸 라이브 스트림하고, 펏지 파티 같은 IP를 활용한 게임도 빠르게 소개하며, SBT 발행 소식, 실제 Pudgy가 들어간 실물 장난감 및 제품 언박싱 등등을 팔로업하면 Pudgy 커뮤니티에서 어떤 일이 벌어지는지 알 수 있습니다.

MOST VALUABLE PENGUIN, 즉 MVP라 불릴 만합니다. 저와 친구가 되어주어 고마워요!"
}

translation.translatedDescription:
Did you know that Pavil is the MVP in the Pudgy community? Every week, there's a hall of fame where penguins who stand out to the community members are recommended, and he's a friend who posted his Pudgy NFT there. That's how sincere he is to the community.

He's a street artist with a very warm heart. If something happens to a member of the Pudgy community, he remembers that day and then draws a picture on the street with the Pudgy NFT of the person who has a special event and shows it off to the community. People all love it.

Drawing is a difficult and challenging process, but it's great that he's been consistently doing art until now. I hope he draws my Pudgy penguin someday.

By live-streaming his drawing on Abstract, quickly introducing games that utilize IPs like Pudgy Party, following up on SBT issuance news, and unboxing real toys and products with Pudgy in them, you can find out what's happening in the Pudgy community.

He deserves to be called the MOST VALUABLE PENGUIN, or MVP. Thank you for being my friend!

data.author: 0x6500555EEAAA4A0f040c558Ec0282c342daa5259
data.subject: 0x0000000000000000000000000000000000000000
data.metadata:
{
  "description": "저는 Karina🌸님 덕분에 Abstract에서 여성이 GigaChad 역할을 받으면 Abstract Angel을 받는다는 것을 처음 알았어요. 한국에서도 카리나님 같은 분이 나오길 바랍니다.

카리나님은 Abstract와 한 몸처럼 움직입니다. 저와는 다르게 유행을 굉장히 빠르게 캐치하시고, 잘 따라가십니다.

저는 좀 둔감한 편이라 잘 못 따라가서 예전에 하던 게임을 자주 하는 반면.. 카리나님은 Abstract에서 밀어주거나 새롭게 올라오면 즉시 플레이하고 트렌디하게 소식을 X 피드에 업데이트해 주셔서 저도 소식을 빠르게 받고, 다른 유저분들도 좋아합니다.

이는 Pudgy 생태계에도 예외는 아니에요. 펏지 펭귄과 Kast와의 협업이 있을 때도, 밸런타인데이 기념 인형이 나왔을 때도 너무 귀여운 그림으로 잘 표현해 주셔서 정말 잘 봤습니다.

Abstract Portal에서 생방송도 자주 하시는데 가끔 찾아가서 보기도 해요. 본인만 방송하고 딱 끄는 게 아니고, 한국 방에 와서 같이 웃고 떠들면서 노니까 한국의 Abstract 유저들도 다들 좋아해요."
}

translation.translatedDescription:
I learned for the first time thanks to Karina🌸 that in Abstract, if a woman gets the role of GigaChad, she gets Abstract Angel. I hope someone like Karina comes out in Korea too.

Karina moves as one with Abstract. Unlike me, she catches trends very quickly and follows them well.

I'm a bit insensitive, so I can't keep up, so I often play games I used to play... On the other hand, when Abstract pushes or new things come up, Karina immediately plays and updates the news on her X feed in a trendy way, so I get the news quickly, and other users like it too.

This is no exception in the Pudgy ecosystem. When there was a collaboration between Pudgy Penguins and Kast, and when Valentine's Day dolls came out, she expressed them so well with cute drawings that I really enjoyed them.

She also often does live broadcasts on Abstract Portal, and I sometimes go and watch them. She doesn't just broadcast and turn it off, but she comes to the Korean room and laughs and chats with us, so Korean Abstract users all like her.

data.author: 0xA270Bde2ecbD72aD259D02D7cCB47D2d95eF94eD
data.subject: 0x0e3274FEa64567fdA14187c89B08f61048F4d45a
data.metadata: {"description":"Abschud is a bit like Leonidas in 300, the first Spartan soldier of Abstract. The Green Lantern. He watches over the essentials and oils the gears of the ecosystem. He brings things to light when needed and sends reminders when necessary.\nHe’s sort of the voice of reason among the Chads on Abstract. Patient and meticulous, he also enforces the rules while making sure to preserve a healthy atmosphere and good vibes."}

translation.translatedDescription:
Abschud is a bit like Leonidas in 300, the first Spartan soldier of Abstract. The Green Lantern. He watches over the essentials and oils the gears of the ecosystem. He brings things to light when needed and sends reminders when necessary.
He’s sort of the voice of reason among the Chads on Abstract. Patient and meticulous, he also enforces the rules while making sure to preserve a healthy atmosphere and good vibes.

data.author: 0xA270Bde2ecbD72aD259D02D7cCB47D2d95eF94eD
data.subject: 0x69C14D9B0073Cc2556aE014B99335bc380a5076f
data.metadata:
{"description":"A reference in Discord security.
If you want to build a community, it necessarily starts with a SAFE Discord, and Jon is your guy.
He has secured most of the major Web3 Discords or audited their security.
A true well of knowledge in the field."}

translation.translatedDescription:
A reference in Discord security.
If you want to build a community, it necessarily starts with a SAFE Discord, and Jon is your guy.
He has secured most of the major Web3 Discords or audited their security.
A true well of knowledge in the field.

data.author: 0xA270Bde2ecbD72aD259D02D7cCB47D2d95eF94eD
data.subject: 0xCCB0e7366CDfBFD471110ff02632F0542ed0283f
data.metadata: {"description":"When I think of Marcelo, I naturally think of Real Madrid’s number 12. And there’s a small resemblance between the two. Both have skills, different ones, of course but Marcello is an excellent content creator and streamer. You always have a great time watching him; he perfectly reflects Abstract’s good vibes. And I don’t think he’s invited everywhere for no reason… He knows how to create a great atmosphere just as well as he knows how to be serious and highlight projects. He has the ability to stay true to himself while adapting to his audience. A man of quality, He’s a real reference within Abstract."}

translation.translatedDescription: When I think of Marcelo, I naturally think of Real Madrid’s number 12. And there’s a small resemblance between the two. Both have skills, different ones, of course but Marcello is an excellent content creator and streamer. You always have a great time watching him; he perfectly reflects Abstract’s good vibes. And I don’t think he’s invited everywhere for no reason… He knows how to create a great atmosphere just as well as he knows how to be serious and highlight projects. He has the ability to stay true to himself while adapting to his audience. A man of quality, He’s a real reference within Abstract.

data.author: 0xE4888BF702294F01fedE3993bFeBc8f638e0c6Ef
data.subject: 0xd0232776459fDF134AE7EA2E5AaAE58904fc3bFe
data.comment: A gem of a person and skilled wizard

translation.translatedContent: A gem of a person and skilled wizard
translation.translatedDescription:
Aiz is a rare breed. I met him initially via his excellent infographics and was lucky enough to meet again through Gigaverse, where he champions growth and rallies the community and creators together. Not only is he extremely skilled in his fields, he manages to be so whilst remaining humble, patient and kind. He creates value and adds it to every room he's in, simultaneously. 

A true pleasure to know him.

data.author: 0x3B8fD3757D38E33E69BC40Dd9fF42fb0BEc35Ec5
data.subject: 0xA270Bde2ecbD72aD259D02D7cCB47D2d95eF94eD

translation.translatedDescription: When people talk to me about Loko, I think of the Ozy NFT collection. Loko is an abstract OG; he works and helps different projects with his designer talents. In addition to being talented, Loko is extremely kind. Very happy to be by his side as a giga.

data.author: 0x3B8fD3757D38E33E69BC40Dd9fF42fb0BEc35Ec5
data.subject: 0x55d22408591f2a70af3e3a60de55d890a319BC58

translation.translatedDescription: Sinet is a great person I met on abstract. He's been committed and involved since the beginning. Always there to propagate the green chain. He makes quality and always useful threads on X. He's also a very good duper player. Sinet is a gigantic chad and it's completely deserved. I hope we go far together on abstract.

data.author: 0xE4888BF702294F01fedE3993bFeBc8f638e0c6Ef
data.subject: 0xA270Bde2ecbD72aD259D02D7cCB47D2d95eF94eD

translation.translatedDescription:
L0K0 is THE Abstract OG. I remember him launching an NFT collection in the early days. He's a builder with a lot of energy and positive work ethic. 

Hard to find people like this, that are also human, kind and humble. A professional and lovely legend.

data.comment: Abstract Angel has never lived up to her name so well
data.metadata: {"description":"Abstract Angel has never lived up to her name so well. She took the time to explain all the mechanics to me and shared all her enthusiasm about Segmint. data.metadata: {"description":"Becca managed to create an IP within an IP lol, just incredible but that’s how I see Becca.
